summary: Iteration 28 - 7 Granular Live Factors feature fully tested and working. All backend tests passed (10/10). Frontend displays all 7 factors with color-coded bars and live context section.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/schedule returns live match (CSK vs RCB - ipl2026_011)
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live returns all 7 live factors in breakdown
Backend: breakdown contains crr_pressure, wickets_in_hand_ratio, recent_wicket_penalty, batter_confidence, new_batsman_factor, bowler_threat, phase_momentum
Backend: All factor values are between 0.0 and 1.0
Backend: live_context dict contains active_batsmen, active_bowler, crr, rrr, recent_wickets_in_12
Backend: Historical factors (h2h_win_pct, venue_win_pct, recent_form_pct, toss_advantage_pct) present in breakdown
Backend: alpha, H, L values present and valid (0-1 range)
Backend: 1st innings has RRR = None (edge case verified)
Frontend: Live match page loads with data-testid='live-match-page'
Frontend: Weighted prediction panel visible with data-testid='weighted-prediction'
Frontend: Live factors breakdown visible with data-testid='live-factors-breakdown'
Frontend: All 7 factor labels displayed with correct weights (0.20, 0.15, 0.15, 0.15, 0.10, 0.10, 0.15)
Frontend: Color-coded bars for each factor (green for good, blue for neutral, yellow/red for concerning)
Frontend: Live context section shows 'Batting: Devdutt Padikkal' and 'CRR 9.76'
Frontend: Claude Opus Prediction panel visible with data-testid='claude-live-prediction'
Frontend: Model consensus indicator shows LOW CONSENSUS (diff 15.7%)
critical_code_review_comments: compute_weighted_prediction function (server.py lines 284-484) correctly implements 7 granular live factors
live_context dict provides useful UI context (active batsmen names, bowler name, CRR, RRR, recent wickets)
LiveMatch.js (lines 449-499) correctly renders all 7 factors with color-coded bars
Recent wickets badge appears when wickets found in last 12 balls (line 453-456)
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing live match data from SportMonks (CSK vs RCB - ipl2026_011)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 features fully working. CSK vs RCB (ipl2026_011) is currently live. The 7 granular live factors are: CRR/RRR Pressure (0.20), Wickets in Hand (0.15), Recent Wkt Penalty (0.15), Batter Confidence (0.15), New Batsman (0.10), Bowler Threat (0.10), Phase Momentum (0.15). The live_context dict provides active batsmen names, bowler name, CRR, RRR, and recent wickets count. Current state: 1 live, 58 upcoming, 11 completed matches.

7_live_factors_backend.description: compute_weighted_prediction returns 7 granular live factors in breakdown dict
7_live_factors_backend.verification: All factors present: crr_pressure=1.0, wickets_in_hand_ratio=0.9, recent_wicket_penalty=1.0, batter_confidence=0.22, new_batsman_factor=0.75, bowler_threat=0.5, phase_momentum=0.0

live_context_backend.description: live_context dict contains active_batsmen, active_bowler, crr, rrr, recent_wickets_in_12

l_value_formula.verification: Formula verified - expected L matches actual L within 0.01 tolerance

frontend_7_factors_display.description: LiveMatch.js renders all 7 factor bars with labels and weights
frontend_7_factors_display.verification: All 7 factors visible with correct labels: CRR/RRR Pressure (0.20), Wickets in Hand (0.15), Recent Wkt Penalty (0.15), Batter Confidence (0.15), New Batsman (0.10), Bowler Threat (0.10), Phase Momentum (0.15)

frontend_live_context.description: Live context section shows active batsmen, bowler, CRR, RRR

color_coded_bars.description: Factor bars use color coding based on value
color_coded_bars.verification: Green for good values, blue for neutral, yellow/red for concerning values
